description: Cross-platform integration map for the lippytm ecosystem

communication_channels.name: GitHub Actions Cross-Repo Dispatch
communication_channels.notes: Uses GitHub repository_dispatch events to trigger workflows across repositories

communication_channels.name: OpenAI ChatGPT Bridge
communication_channels.notes: All AI chat interactions route through the Tower Control repo

communication_channels.name: Web3 / Blockchain Layer
communication_channels.notes: Smart contract interactions and on-chain data for all Web3-capable repositories

communication_channels.name: ManyChat Platform Bridge
communication_channels.notes: ManyChat sends user interaction events via webhook to the chat hub

communication_channels.name: BotBuilders Integration
communication_channels.notes: BotBuilders.com bot flows integrated with AI responses

communication_channels.name: Factory.ai Orchestration Bus
communication_channels.notes: Factory.ai serves as the workflow orchestration bus routing tasks between services

communication_channels.name: Replit Dev Environment
communication_channels.notes: Replit used as a live dev environment, synced with GitHub repositories

communication_channels.name: lippytm.ai Central Hub
communication_channels.notes: Central API hub that all repositories can query for ecosystem state and shared data

integration_rules.description: All cross-repository communication should be routed through lippytm.ai or the Agency Hub before reaching its destination
Repositories communicate via events (webhooks, repository_dispatch) rather than direct polling
Critical data exchanges and agreements between repositories should be recordable on-chain for transparency
